Description:
Ballistics of the 25mm OZR-85(M) HE-Frag Incendiary Tracing round fired from the 110-PM autocannon, as part of the naval mount 2M-3, 2M-8 and 4M-120. The gun was produced with modification in the PRC as the Type 61. The OZR-85 round is produced in the PRC as the WB705P with steel cartridge and WB705PG with copper cartridge.

Projectile weighs 282 grams, ballistics is given either as 2900 kgf/cm^2 and 890 m/s, or 2800 kgf/cm^2 and 880 m/s. Gun measures 2810mm long, the barrel 2000mm. Breech measures 225mm to start of rifling. Automatics cycles at 400-450 rpm, recoil length is 175mm, extreme value 178mm. Cartridge volume measures 177.5 mm deep. Chamber volume is 121.22 cm^3 for steel and 124.72 cm^3 for copper cartridge. Loads 95-97 grams of 7/14 grains of pyroxylin propellant.

Pressure is copper crusher gauge value, converts to piezoelectric value with a factor of 1.12.

References:
 -《国产火炮手册》兵器工业部第二管理局，1982
 -《火炮内弹道计算手册》王连荣，张佩勤，国防工业出版社，1987
